name: quick-secret-saver
title: Quick Secret Saver
description: Quickly save and retrieve free-text secrets like passwords, tokens, and notes.
author: jayden0

commands.name: save
commands.title: Save Secret
commands.subtitle: Quick Secret Saver
commands.description: Manually create a new secret with a title and content.

commands.name: save-from-clipboard
commands.title: Save Secret from Clipboard
commands.subtitle: Quick Secret Saver
commands.description: Save the current clipboard text as a new secret.

commands.name: search
commands.title: Search Secrets
commands.subtitle: Quick Secret Saver
commands.description: Search, copy, view, edit, and delete saved secrets.

commands.name: sync
commands.title: Sync Secrets
commands.subtitle: Quick Secret Saver
commands.description: Sync secrets with a private GitHub gist (encrypted).

preferences.name: githubToken
preferences.title: GitHub Token
preferences.description: Personal access token with the 'gist' scope.

preferences.name: gistId
preferences.title: Gist ID
preferences.description: ID of a private gist to sync into. Create an empty secret gist first, then paste its id here.
